name: Lace Fundamentals
description: Baseline developer environment for lace containers: git identity, dotfiles integration, default shell, and screenshot access.

defaultShell.description: Absolute path to the default login shell (e.g., /usr/bin/nu). Empty string means no shell change. Typically populated from user.json defaultShell.

dotfiles.description: Dotfiles repo for chezmoi apply. Can be a direct git clone or a local checkout.
dotfiles.hint: Point to your dotfiles repo checkout, or configure a repoMount for automatic cloning

screenshots.description: Host screenshots directory for Claude Code image references
screenshots.hint: Override source in settings.json. macOS: ~/Desktop/Screenshots, Linux: ~/Pictures/Screenshots
